query:
SELECT 
  ts.deviceId,
  COUNT(*) as totalSets,
  SUM(ts.totalAttempts) as totalAttempts,
  MAX(ts.bestAccuracy) as bestAccuracy
FROM training_sets ts
WHERE ts.deviceId IS NOT NULL AND ts.userId IS NULL
GROUP BY ts.deviceId
ORDER BY totalAttempts DESC
LIMIT 20;
